recommended_evidence_quality_note.ARC-062_MECH-309: V3-EXQ-543h non_contributory (autopsy 2026-05-18). Gated policy collapsed to inert on all gated arms and all 3 seeds (n_inert_gating_seeds=3, probe_gate failed). The script's repro_543g_signature check is sign-only (ARM_2>ARM_3) and returned True while the substrate inverted from active (543g) to inert; this misfired the pre-registered interpretation grid into branch (b). Correct branch is (c): non_contributory across all claims. ARC-062 contributory trained-policy evidence remains narrow (543g weakens [active gating], 543f non_contributory); pending_retest_after_substrate.
recommended_evidence_quality_note.INV-074_MECH-334: V3-EXQ-543h does NOT weaken INV-074 or MECH-334 (autopsy 2026-05-18, correcting the manifest's branch-(b) per_claim weakens). Crystallization freezes head_0/head_1/discriminator; the gated policy was inert before the closure fired, so the PNN/Lynx1/NgR1-analog crystallization mechanism was never exercised. Missing prerequisite (functional differentiated GatedPolicy = MECH-333/INV-074), not claim pressure. evidence_direction = non_contributory; pending_retest_after_substrate.
recommended_evidence_quality_note.supersession_indexer: Do NOT honor V3-EXQ-543h supersedes: V3-EXQ-543g. 543h failed to reproduce 543g's substrate state (active -> inert). 543g remains active ARC-062 evidence until V3-EXQ-543i (which supersedes both) lands.

supersession_directive.reason: 543h did not reproduce 543g's substrate state (active gating -> inert all seeds); cannot subsume it
supersession_directive.planned_future_supersedes: V3-EXQ-543i supersedes BOTH V3-EXQ-543g and V3-EXQ-543h (queued only after substrate stabilisation)

recommended_substrate_queue_entry.observed: 3/3 seeds inert on every gated arm (ARM_2/3/6/7); behavioral-divergence probe mean_tv_distance < INERT_GATING_THRESHOLD=0.05
recommended_substrate_queue_entry.threshold_a_working_impl_must_exceed: n_inert_gating_seeds == 0 across all seeds on all gated arms under the trained-policy (REINFORCE) regime; behavioral-divergence probe mean_tv_distance sustained >= 0.05 at end of P1
recommended_substrate_queue_entry.root_cause_hypothesis: head_div regularizer removed (symmetric-cancellation argument, 543g/h); replacement disc_var@0.1 does not maintain head_0/head_1 divergence under REINFORCE -> heads collapse; activation RNG/init-sensitive

targets.narrow_supports_detail: ARC-062 contributory trained-policy evidence near-zero: 543g weakens (active gating), 543f non_contributory; MECH-309 family 522 PASS heuristic-only, 433e/433f/523/523a/523b non_contributory. Voiding 543h must not read as conflict resolution for ARC-062.
learning_extracted: MECH-334/crystallization is untestable until the GatedPolicy it freezes carries differentiated heads under trained policy (discovered prerequisite, not falsification)
GatedPolicy head-differentiation under outcome-coupled REINFORCE is unstable/init-sensitive after head_div removal; disc_var@0.1 insufficient
Sign-only replication checks can misfire a pre-registered interpretation grid and emit spurious weakens; replication gates must assert n_inert==0, not just an inequality sign
A supersedes: declaration must not be honored when the superseding run failed to reproduce the predecessor's substrate state

cluster_pattern.shape: GatedPolicy head-differentiation does not robustly persist under outcome-coupled REINFORCE; gated arms collapse to inert (probe TV < 0.05) intermittently -- active in 543g, inert in 543f/543h with structurally identical 2x2 config
cluster_pattern.structural_property: the gated/rule-apprehension substrate has the asserted wiring but does not reliably carry differentiated policy behaviour under a trained policy; activation is RNG/init-sensitive (substrate-ceiling, unstable-activation variant) -- continuous with MECH-309's documented V_s-monostrategy substrate-ceiling
cluster_pattern.forced_decision: substrate reading primary -> /implement-substrate (stabilise differentiation); test-design reading mandatory secondary -> fix repro acceptance gate in the redesigned V3-EXQ-543i
